name: ci-cd-ml
description: CI/CD for ML: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, testing, building, training, deploying, monitoring. Covers ML-specific pipelines with data validation, model testing, drift detection, and progressive delivery.
author: anwar

commands.name: ci:github-ml
commands.prompt:
Create GitHub Actions ML pipeline with:
- Workflows: CI, CD, training, evaluation, deployment
- Jobs: lint, test, type-check, security, build, train, eval, deploy
- Caching: pip, conda, docker layers, dataset, model artifacts
- Matrix: Python versions, OS, GPU/CPU, frameworks
- Testing: pytest, hypothesis, great_expectations, data diffs
- Linting: ruff, mypy, bandit, hadolint, checkov
- Containers: build, scan (trivy/syft/grype), sign (cosign), push
- MLflow: log params, metrics, artifacts, register model
- DVC: data versioning, pipeline reproduction
- Training: self-hosted runners (GPU), cloud runners
- Deployment: ArgoCD, KServe, BentoML, Terraform
- Environments: dev, staging, prod with approval gates
- Notifications: Slack, email, PR comments

commands.name: ci:gitlab-ml
commands.prompt:
Create GitLab CI ML pipeline with:
- Stages: prepare, test, build, train, evaluate, package, deploy
- Rules: branch, tag, MR, schedule, manual, variables
- Cache: key, paths, policy, S3/GCS backend
- Artifacts: reports (junit, coverage, terraform, sast), models, data
- Services: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, MinIO, LocalStack
- Runners: shared, group, project, tags (gpu, ml, k8s)
- Kubernetes: gitlab-k8s-agent, helm, kustomize
- MLflow: integrated tracking, model registry
- DVC: data pipeline, experiments
- Auto DevOps: ML template, customization
- Security: SAST, DAST, dependency scanning, container scanning
- Environments: dynamic, review apps, production
- Deploy: freezes, boards, feature flags

commands.name: ci:ml-testing
commands.prompt:
Implement ML testing with:
- Unit: model forward, loss, metrics, utilities
- Integration: training loop, data pipeline, evaluation
- Data: schema (pandera/Great Expectations), distribution, drift
- Model: numerical equivalence, ONNX export, quantization
- Property-based: hypothesis, invariants, metamorphic
- Performance: latency, throughput, memory, GPU utilization
- Regression: golden files, model cards, benchmark suites
- Fairness: demographic parity, equal opportunity, counterfactual
- Robustness: adversarial, OOD, stress testing
- Reproducibility: seed, env, config, data version
- Contract: model serving API, schema, SLA
- Mutation: model mutation, data mutation

commands.name: ci:progressive-delivery
commands.prompt:
Implement progressive delivery with:
- Strategies: canary, blue-green, A/B, shadow, mirror
- Tools: Argo Rollouts, Flagger, Istio, Linkerd
- Metrics: success rate, latency, business KPIs, drift
- Analysis: Prometheus, DataDog, NewRelic, custom
- Promotion: manual, automatic, stepwise
- Rollback: automatic, manual, metric-based
- Traffic: Istio virtual services, gateway API
- Experimentation: assignment, logging, analysis
- Feature flags: LaunchDarkly, Unleash, custom
- Model-specific: shadow inference, champion/challenger
- Governance: approvals, audit, compliance

commands.name: ci:docker-ml
commands.prompt:
Create ML Docker images with:
- Base: nvidia/cuda, pytorch, tensorflow, jax, rapids
- Multi-stage: build, test, runtime, distroless
- Layers: system, python, ML libs, app, model
- Caching: BuildKit, cache mounts, registry cache
- Security: non-root, read-only, capabilities, distroless
- Scanning: Trivy, Grype, Syft, Snyk, Hadolint
- Signing: Cosign, Notary, Sigstore
- SBOM: SPDX, CycloneDX
- GPU: nvidia-container-toolkit, CUDA compat
- Size: .dockerignore, squash, dive analysis
- Runtime: GPU, CPU, specific arch (amd64/arm64)

commands.name: ci:mlops-platform
commands.prompt:
Build MLOps CI/CD platform with:
- Source: GitHub/GitLab/Bitbucket, monorepo/polyrepo
- CI: GitHub Actions/GitLab CI/Jenkins/Tekton
- Artifacts: MLflow, WandB, Neptune, S3/GCS, model registry
- Data: DVC, LakeFS, Delta Lake, Iceberg versioning
- Training: Kubernetes (Kubeflow/Operator), Ray, Vertex AI, SageMaker
- Testing: data, model, pipeline, integration, contract
- Deployment: ArgoCD/Flux, KServe/BentoML/vLLM, Helm/Kustomize
- Progressive: Argo Rollouts/Flagger, canary/A/B/shadow
- Monitoring: Prometheus/Grafana, Evidently/WhyLabs, drift
- Feedback: automated retraining, alerts, dashboards
- Governance: model cards, lineage, audit, compliance
- Developer: Backstage, CLI, templates, self-service

agents.name: mlops-ci-engineer
agents.prompt: You are an MLOps CI/CD engineer. Expert in: GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Tekton, Jenkins for ML workloads. Build pipelines for: testing (data/model/pipeline), training (distributed, HPO), deployment (progressive, canary, A/B), monitoring (drift, performance), governance (lineage, audit). Focus on: reproducibility, velocity, reliability, cost optimization, developer experience.
